basic_details.job_title: Kamrup Gaon Pradhan Recruitment 2026: 55 Vacancies, Eligibility, Salary & Application Process
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Commissioner, Kamrup: Amingaon (Land Revenue Branch)
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Commissioner, Kamrup: Amingaon (Land Revenue Branch), Government of Assam has released the Kamrup Gaon Pradhan Recruitment 2026 notification on 20 July 2026 for the appointment of Gaon Pradhan posts in Kamrup district. A total of 55 vacancies have been announced through this recruitment drive under various Revenue Circles of Kamrup.

age_limit.details: Candidate must not be less than 30 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age will be calculated based on the Birth Certificate issued by the competent authority or the HSLC Admit Card/Certificate issued by a recognised Board/Council. No other document will be accepted as age proof.

qualification.details: Candidate must not be less than 30 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age will be calculated based on the Birth Certificate issued by the competent authority or the HSLC Admit Card/Certificate issued by a recognised Board/Council. No other document will be accepted as age proof. | Candidates must be minimum 10th (HSLC) passed from a Board/Institution recognised by the State or Central Government. | Must be a citizen of India and a permanent resident of the area for which appointment is sought. Must be physically fit and of sound mind. Must not have been declared insolvent or a defaulter in payment of Government dues (a Bakijai Clearance Certificate must be furnished). Must not be a government employee. Must not be a member of any political party. Must have land or immovable property in his/her own name in the village where appointment as Gaon Pradhan is sought. Preference will be given to family members of the previous Gaon Pradhan, and the views of the Mouzadar will be taken into consideration. Candidate should be a person of high status and command, holding a respectable position in society. Candidate must not have more than 2 (two) living children from a single or multiple partners (as per Government of Assam Notification dated 19th July 2019, No. RLR.187/2007/Pt/24). Candidate must furnish a self-affidavit confirming they do not have more than two living children from a single/multiple partners.

salary_details.details: The selected Gaon Pradhan will receive a monthly remuneration of Rs. 14,000 (Rupees Fourteen Thousand only) per month.

selection_process: Selection is made purely through a Viva Voce (Interview). No written examination is mentioned in the notification. Eligible candidates scoring the highest marks in the Viva Voce interview will be selected for the post of Gaon Pradhan for the concerned village. Date and venue of the interview will be notified later through Circle offices

Kamrup website (www.kamrup.assam.gov.in). All appointments will be made only after a Police verification report as per procedure. The decision of the District Commissioner regarding a candidate's eligibility for the interview shall be final.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted only in the prescribed Standard Form, "Part IX of the Assam Gazette." No other application format will be accepted.

Duly filled applications, along with all required self-attested documents, must be submitted in the Application Receiving Box kept in the Land Revenue Branch of the Integrated District Commissioner Office, Kamrup, Amingaon (1st Floor).
Applications can be submitted from the , during office hours.
There is no online application process mentioned in the notification - the mode of application is entirely offline (physical submission).
important_instructions: Candidates must carry all testimonials in original along with photocopies at the time of the interview. No request for a different interview date will be entertained if a candidate fails to attend on the scheduled date. Eligible candidates scoring the highest marks in the Viva Voce interview will be selected for the concerned village. All appointments are subject to a Police verification report. The District Commissioner's decision on eligibility for the interview is final.

content_sections.heading: Kamrup Gaon Pradhan Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

rows.details: Office of the District Commissioner, Kamrup: Amingaon (Land Revenue Branch)
Offline (Standard Form, Part IX of the Assam Gazette)

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details: Gaon Pradhan Posts by Revenue Circle
content_sections.text: The 55 Gaon Pradhan vacancies are distributed across 11 Revenue Circles of Kamrup district as follows: Candidates must apply for a specific village/lot. Below is the complete village-wise vacancy list as given in the official notification: Applicants must clearly mention the name of the village(s) they are applying for in the application form, as required by the notification.

rows.lot_village: 1 No. Sassalpara, 2 No. Sassalpara, Mahmarang, Madanpur, Borshola
1 No. Barduar Bagan, 2 No. Barduar Bagan
No. 1 Balagaon, No. 2 Balagaon, No. 2 Topar Pathar, Dekradia, Kalardia, Kalardia Top

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidate must not be less than 30 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age will be calculated based on the Birth Certificate issued by the competent authority or the HSLC Admit Card/Certificate issued by a recognised Board/Council. No other document will be accepted as age proof. Candidates must be minimum 10th (HSLC) passed from a Board/Institution recognised by the State or Central Government. Must be a citizen of India and a permanent resident of the area for which appointment is sought. Must be physically fit and of sound mind. Must not have been declared insolvent or a defaulter in payment of Government dues (a Bakijai Clearance Certificate must be furnished). Must not be a government employee. Must not be a member of any political party. Must have land or immovable property in his/her own name in the village where appointment as Gaon Pradhan is sought. Preference will be given to family members of the previous Gaon Pradhan, and the views of the Mouzadar will be taken into consideration. Candidate should be a person of high status and command, holding a respectable position in society. Candidate must not have more than 2 (two) living children from a single or multiple partners (as per Government of Assam Notification dated 19th July 2019, No. RLR.187/2007/Pt/24). Candidate must furnish a self-affidavit confirming they do not have more than two living children from a single/multiple partners.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: The selected Gaon Pradhan will receive a monthly remuneration of Rs. 14,000 (Rupees Fourteen Thousand only) per month.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is made purely through a Viva Voce (Interview) . No written examination is mentioned in the notification. Eligible candidates scoring the highest marks in the Viva Voce interview will be selected for the post of Gaon Pradhan for the concerned village. Date and venue of the interview will be notified later through Circle offices, Mouzadar offices, and the District Commissioner, Kamrup website ( www.kamrup.assam.gov.in ). All appointments will be made only after a Police verification report as per procedure. The decision of the District Commissioner regarding a candidate's eligibility for the interview shall be final.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Applications must be accompanied by self-attested copies of the following documents: Educational qualification certificate, mark sheet, and Admit Card of HSLC Age proof certificate (Birth Certificate issued by competent authority, or HSLC Admit Card/Certificate issued by a recognised Board/Council) Three recent passport-size colour photographs, size 3.5 cm x 4.5 cm, with white background PAN Card Voter ID Card Small Family Norms affidavit/self-declaration (not more than two living children from single/multiple partners) Jamabandi in respect of the applicant or his/her parents for the concerned village, showing ownership of land/immovable property Mouzadar certificate confirming the applicant belongs to the village applied for Permanent Residence Certificate (PRC) Self-declaration stating the applicant does not belong to any political party and is not a government employee Bakijai Clearance Certificate Caste Certificate (if any)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply (Application Process)
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted only in the prescribed Standard Form, "Part IX of the Assam Gazette." No other application format will be accepted. Duly filled applications, along with all required self-attested documents, must be submitted in the Application Receiving Box kept in the Land Revenue Branch of the Integrated District Commissioner Office, Kamrup, Amingaon (1st Floor). Applications can be submitted from the , during office hours. There is no online application process mentioned in the notification - the mode of application is entirely offline (physical submission).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry all testimonials in original along with photocopies at the time of the interview. No request for a different interview date will be entertained if a candidate fails to attend on the scheduled date. Eligible candidates scoring the highest marks in the Viva Voce interview will be selected for the concerned village. All appointments are subject to a Police verification report. The District Commissioner's decision on eligibility for the interview is final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Kamrup Gaon Pradhan Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications is 20th August 2026, during office hours.

faq.question: Q2. How many Gaon Pradhan vacancies are there in Kamrup district?
faq.answer: There are 55 vacant Gaon Pradhan posts spread across 11 Revenue Circles of Kamrup district.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary of a Gaon Pradhan in Assam?
faq.answer: The Gaon Pradhan receives a monthly remuneration of Rs. 14,000, as per this notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Gaon Pradhan post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not less than 30 years of age as on 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for Gaon Pradhan recruitment?
faq.answer: A minimum of 10th standard (HSLC) pass from a recognised Board/Institution is required.

faq.question: Q6. Can a government employee apply for the Gaon Pradhan post?
faq.answer: No. As per the notification, the candidate should not be a government employee.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies only an offline application process using the Standard Form (Part IX of the Assam Gazette), to be submitted physically at the Kamrup Amingaon office.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Kamrup Gaon Pradhan Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications is 20th August 2026, during office hours.
